text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just when I think Inari One isn't going to show up
to training...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm late! Sorry, Boss. No excuses for my
disgraceful behavior!
choice_data_list: What happened to make you late?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm late! Sorry, Boss. No excuses for my
disgraceful behavior!
choice_data_list: What happened to make you late?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Didn't I just say I don't make excuses?! I'm an Edo
girl, after all!
choice_data_list: ...Well, just be careful from now on.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tch! You're so mature and sensible! Meanwhile,
just look at me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm real sorry! Feel free to splash boilin' hot soup
in my face as a punishment!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Inari One refuses to tell me why she
arrived late. However, she appears to be quite
remorseful, so I decide to let it slide this time.
